name: Stir-Fried Beef with Orange
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Rice wine or dry sherry
2 Dried red chiles - cut in half lengthwise
1 tbsp Coarsely chopped orange peel (fresh) - OR - 2 tsp soaked and coarsely chopped dried citrus peel
recipeInstructions:
1. CUT THE BEEF into thin slices, about 2 inches long, cutting against the grain.
2. PLACE the beef in a bowl with the soy sauce, rice wine or sherry, ginger, cornstarch, and 1 teaspoon of sesame oil. MIX WELL.
3. LET the mixture marinate for about 20 minutes.
4. HEAT the oil in a wok or large skillet until very hot.
5. REMOVE the beef from the marinade using a slotted spoon and ADD it to the pan. STIR-FRY for 2 minutes until it browns.
6. REMOVE the beef and LET IT DRAIN in a colander or sieve.
7. POUR OFF MOST OF THE OIL, leaving about 1 teaspoon.
8. REHEAT the pan over high heat and ADD the dried chiles. STIR-FRY for 10 seconds.
9. RETURN the beef to the pan and ADD the remaining ingredients.
10. STIR-FRY for 4 minutes, mixing well.
11. SERVE the dish immediately.
